title: pavonia calycina
intro: Pavonia calycina, also known as Rose Mallow or Rockrose Mallow, is a perennial plant species native to the Americas, belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pavonia calycina include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Pavonia calycina can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to gastrointestinal problems.
